headline: Why Is Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Down 19.7% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
